diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Fecal impaction causing large bowel obstruction with concern for stercoral colitis
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient had a history of dementia and was brought in with altered mental status and fever, indicative of potentially severe illness. Imaging studies revealed fecal impaction and associated findings suggestive of stercoral colitis. Despite treatment, she remained hypotensive and her lactate levels continued to rise, confirming the severity of her bowel obstruction and systemic response.
